task: Advanced high-value task: Construction Robotics Room Scenario-Based Acceptance Test. Scenario: a senior technical lead needs to decide whether to hold, release, retest, or redesign based only on supplied evidence for construction robotics room. Embedded packet: Records: R1 doorway_m=66 obstacle_count=102 floor_slope_pct=5; R2 doorway_m=75 obstacle_count=98 floor_slope_pct=8; R3 doorway_m=61 obstacle_count=113 floor_slope_pct=4. Remediation options: O1 changes doorway_m by -12% cost=89000; O2 changes obstacle_count by -18% cost=103800; O3 changes floor_slope_pct by -25% cost=62200; max_budget=129600. Rules and constraints: robot requires doorway>=0.85m, obstacles<=5, slope<=2%; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: evaluate whether the supplied remediation options are relevant, affordable, and sufficient to change the final decision. Deliver robotics_layout_3.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
